use_cases: Displaying user or business locations with interactive 3D tilting effects
Showing contact or event coordinates with expandable details
Adding animated location cards to landing pages or profiles
Creating interactive map placeholder components with hover responsiveness
ai_summary: A 3D interactive location display card that shows geographic coordinates with perspective tilt effects. Features smooth mouse-tracking parallax animations using spring physics, hover glow states, and click-to-expand functionality. Renders location text and coordinates in a bordered, rounded container with background styling.
